text: Living a healthy life is about more than just eating vegetables. A balanced diet with plenty of fruits, whole grains, and protein gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, even a thirty-minute walk, keeps your heart strong and your mind clear. Equally important is getting enough sleep—aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your body rest and recover. Don’t forget your mental health: make time for hobbies and talking with friends. Finally, a good work-life balance means setting boundaries so you can relax without stress. By combining these habits, you can feel your best every day.
